Note the aspects of the planets in these two forms of Direc
tion on the luminaries, lagna, and tenth house of the natal
chart. The aspect of a planet to an angle indicates the event to
happen.
In the theory of Directions there are as many as seven
different views. (i) Some like or hold the Radix measure of
59'.8" per year. (ii) Some take the actual solar motion and
want us to add this to every year that has e~apsed. (iii) An-

Directions: Preliminaries 91
other section takes fifteen minutes per year to be added to the
ascendant, M.C., luminaries and others. This is said to indi
cate worldly prosperity and it is assumed to indicate the time
of death. (iv) W.Frankland advocated adding 4 2f7 degrees per
year. (v) He also advocated adding 4n deg. per year. (vi) Dr.
Gamold advocated adding 3/5 deg. per every year. (vii) Carter
and others preferred one degree per year. The last is called by
